en.title: Popular Related
en.prompt: Generate a list of 10 popular questions related to [keywords], that are relevant for [target users].
en.remark: This can be used to understand the focus of users on specific topics, or to organize the structure of articles. It can also be changed to 'popular keywords', 'popular topics', 'popular brands', 'popular websites' and so on.

related.title: Rephrase
related.remark: Rewrite the specified content into multiple versions to avoid text duplication.

related.title: FAQs Generator
related.remark: Generate common Q&A based on content.

metaDescription: Generate 10 popular questions tied to your keywords and audience. Discover high-interest topics worth covering.

faq.q: Are these popular questions really popular, or is the AI guessing?
faq.a: They are the AI's "estimate" of popular topics based on training data, not real-time search trends. For actual popularity, check Google Trends, Baidu Index, or Ahrefs. Treat this prompt as topic inspiration, not as a data source.

faq.q: How do I adapt it to generate trending topics, brands, or websites?
faq.a: Swap "popular questions" in the prompt for "trending topics," "popular brands," or "authoritative websites." The positioning word (questions / topics / brands) is the key term that determines the output direction, and changing it is all you need to reuse the prompt.
